svg.text: HHMI public photodimerization scout rows
Built only from data/public_demo_cases.csv; illustrative triage, not model validation.
6-methylcoumarin - cucurbit[8]uril in water
public_crystal_water_comparison - Pemberton et al. Chem. Commun. 2011 DOI 10.1039/C1CC11164G; RSC ESI CCDC 814052
Caveat: Crystal contact is an interpretable prior from a host-guest CIF, not direct water-phase encounter geometry.
coumarin - water direct UV
public_evidence - Jeyapalan et al. J. Photochem. Photobiol. A 2021 DOI 10.1016/j.jphotochem.2021.113492
Caveat: Public-facing row is qualitative; do not attach unchecked quantitative values.
trans-cinnamic acids - gamma-cyclodextrin in water
public_water_outcome_only - Pattabiraman et al. Organic Letters 2005 DOI 10.1021/ol047866k
Caveat: Same paper family as the CB8 row; present as host-contrast scaffold rather than independent exhaustive evidence.
trans-cinnamic acids - cucurbit[8]uril in water
public_water_outcome_only - Pattabiraman et al. Organic Letters 2005 DOI 10.1021/ol047866k
Caveat: Family-level public row; do not imply all derivatives share one outcome or a measured crystal geometry.
trans-cinnamic acid esters - water-soluble Pd nanocage
public_water_outcome_only - Karthikeyan and Ramamurthy J. Org. Chem. 2007 DOI 10.1021/jo0617722
Caveat: Public nanocage precedent only; keep as family-level literature context rather than a validated model row.
public-safe generic alkene schema - detached RDKit/scoring mechanics
schema_demo_only - Generated from Scout v0 schema only; no source-evidence row attached
Caveat: Schema row is visual mechanics only and must not be counted as literature evidence.
